data.title: MITER Foundation renews partnership with Homes For Our Troops for 3 more years, celebrating 10-year collaboration.
data.description: MITER Foundation, the charitable arm of residential window and door manufacturer MITER Brands, has revealed its 10-year collaboration with Homes For Our Troops and has decided to extend this partnership for an additional three years. Homes for Our Troops, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization, constructs and gives custom homes to severely injured post-9/11 Veterans, aiding them in rebuilding their lives. The partnership between MITER Foundation and Homes for Our Troops has been significant in supporting Veterans, and with this renewal, the commitment is solidified for the next three years.

data.title: Bear Icebox Communications named a finalist for B2B Campaign of the Year at the 2025 PRNews Platinum PR Awards. Recognition among industry giants.
data.description: A small agency based in Chicago, Bear Icebox Communications, has been recognized as a Finalist for B2B Campaign of the Year in the 2025 Platinum PR Awards by PRNEWS. This nomination highlights their exceptional campaign in a field dominated by industry giants. The agency's achievement was acknowledged following a surge in nominations, indicating a highly competitive selection process this year.

data.title: AgeTech Connect Summit focuses on Longevity Economy & Future of Work, Customers, and Community. Over 1.4 billion adults over 60 by 2030.
data.description: Registration for a new event focusing on AgeTech's impact on the lives of older adults and related markets is now available at a discounted rate. The event will take place in Atlanta on September 25, 2025. By 2030, the global population of individuals over 60 years old is estimated to hit 1.4 billion, underlining the significance of AgeTech innovations in this demographic.

data.title: Coach Scott Barla of Barla Golf Academy named Golf Digest's No. 1 Teacher in Indiana for 2026-2027.
data.description: Barla Golf Academy in Noblesville, Indiana, has gained recognition for its data-driven player development. On September 25, 2025, the academy revealed that Coach Scott Barla has been honored as Golf Digest's top teacher in Indiana for the 2026–2027 period. This title emphasizes Barla's commitment to employing measurable techniques in enhancing players' skills. This accomplishment highlights the academy's dedication to utilizing data to drive player improvement and solidify its reputation in the golf instruction field.

data.title: Vegalab CEO David Selakovic moderates discussions on agricultural biotechnology at Food Security SummitX Dubai 2025.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware on September 25, 2025, David Selakovic, the Founder and CEO of Vegalab, played a prominent role at the Food Security SummitX in Dubai. He led discussions on the future of agricultural biotechnology and shared insights in various sessions.

data.title: Scalefocus from Sofia, Bulgaria, wins Silver Stevie® Award at 22nd Annual International Business Awards® for Energy Industry Innovation.
data.description: In Sofia, Bulgaria on September 25, 2025, Scalefocus received recognition for its innovative work in the energy sector at the 22nd Annual International Business Awards®. The company was honored with a Silver Stevie® Award in the Energy Industry Innovation of the Year category. This acknowledgment highlights Scalefocus' significant achievements in transforming the energy industry, showcasing their dedication to innovation and excellence in their field.

data.title: Rustic Bakery in Bay Area marks 20th anniversary with culinary events, known for artisanal flatbreads.
data.description: A renowned brand in the Bay Area is uniting culinary experts and collaborators to showcase 'Perfect Bites' in Petaluma, California. Rustic Bakery, famous for its gourmet flatbreads, will mark its 20th anniversary in October, honoring the day it sent out its inaugural shipment. The event will highlight the brand's success over two decades, with an array of  culinary leaders and partners joining to share their expertise.

data.title: AIM ImmunoTech obtains patent in Japan until 2039 for cancer therapy using Ampligen® with Checkpoint Inhibitors, for market expansion and revenue growth.
data.description: A recently obtained patent serves as a crucial component of AIM's plan to broaden protection in international markets, paving the way for potential licensing deals, partnerships, and sustainable revenue escalation.

data.title: Allied Energy Corp signs MOU to develop option agreement on Silver Reef Gold Property in California.
data.description: Allied Energy Corporation has recently announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) aimed at developing an Option Agreement for the Silver Reef Gold Property located in California. The property, renowned for its gold deposits, holds significant promise for potential development. This move signifies a strategic step towards further exploration and utilization of the resources within the Silver Reef Gold Property.

data.title: AmpliPhi Trees partners with Bhutan MoAL for sustainability goals, pilot program with advanced tech. Bhutan's 21st Century Economic Roadmap in focus.
data.description: AmpliPhi Trees and Bhutan's Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock have initiated discussions for a potential pilot program aimed at integrating advanced technology to support the realization of Bhutan's 21st Century Economic Roadmap. The Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock (MoAL) in THIMPHU, Bhutan, made this announcement on September 25, 2025. This collaboration seeks to leverage cutting-edge solutions to enhance economic development in the country.

data.title: Tineco presents FLOOR ONE S9 Artist at Milan Fashion Week with 19.5M users worldwide, showcasing innovative home tech.
data.description: Top-tier technology company, Tineco, known for its innovative home appliances, revealed its involvement in Milan Fashion Week 2025. The company, boasting a considerable user base of 19.5 million globally, showcased its premier FLOOR ONE S9 Artist Series at the event.

data.title: Dallas-Fort Worth store to host Monster Jam truck event, offering free event ticket to customers.High-octane excitement comig to Grand Prairie, Texas store with exclusive deal for customers.
data.description: A special promotion is currently ongoing at the Grand Prairie, Texas store, where customers have the opportunity to snag a complimentary Monster Jam® event ticket. Scheduled for September 25, 2025, the event, hosted by Northern Tool + Equipment, brings the thrilling world of Monster Jam® to the Dallas-Fort Worth area. Make sure to take advantage of this exclusive offer to experience the excitement firsthand.

data.title: Report for CISOs on securing enterprise adoption of GenAI, identifying key risk vectors like data leakage and API exploitation.
data.description: Dublin - A new report titled "Insights for CISOs: Guarding the AI Gateway" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report is designed for Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs) and offers a detailed guide on securing enterprise adoption of GenAI technologies. It highlights important risk factors such as prompt injection, data leakage, API exploitation, model poisoning, and shadow AI while providing strategic recommendations to address these risks effectively. As the use of generative AI continues to grow, this report aims to assist CISOs in navigating potential security challenges.

data.title: Hayden AI partners with UC San Diego to deploy enforcement systems on 15 buses for bike lane and bus stop violations.
data.description: In San Francisco, Hayden AI, a top provider of vision AI solutions for safer cities, revealed that the University of California San Diego is set to utilize its automated systems for monitoring bike lane and bus stop violations. The technology will be integrated into 15 Triton Transit buses within UCSD's transportation system to crackdown on dangerous parking infractions happening on campus. A two-month warning phase will commence in December.

data.title: Marathon Health and Medbridge team up for a new virtual MSK program in advanced primary care, promising better access and outcomes.
data.description: In a joint announcement made by Marathon Health and MedBridge, a new virtual musculoskeletal (MSK) care program has been introduced. This program is seamlessly integrated into Marathon’s advanced primary care and MoveWellTM MSK solutions. Using MedBridge’s evidence-based Pathways platform, the newly launched solution aims to improve access to MSK care, enhancing patient experience and leading to better outcomes. With MSK conditions being a significant health issue, this initiative will address the concern by providing improved care, reducing costs, and minimizing care fragmentation.

data.title: Fender receives $40M from Tiger Finance to enhance financial flexibility with FILO and asset-based loans.
data.description: A well-known music and cultural figure has strengthened its financial standing by securing FILO and senior asset-based loans. In a recent development on September 25, 2025 in New York, Tiger Finance has granted a $40 million commitment to increase the robust liquidity reserves of Fender Musical Instruments Corp. (FMIC).
